title: Unexpected exception behavior with brace expression and s3 and S3Cluster table function
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
Similarly to what was described [here](https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/88920), ClickHouse behaves differently when importing a single file or the same file twice using brace expression.
ClickHouse throws a parsing exception when importing a single file, but not with multiple files with brace expression.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
Reproduced on `25.10.1.3832`
### How to reproduce
Create a parquet file as follows:
```python
import pandas as pd
data_1 = {
"ts" : ["2020-01-01 14:00:00+00:00"]
}
df_1 = pd.DataFrame(data_1)
df_1.to_parquet("output.parquet", index=False)
```
Check the file:
```
DESCRIBE TABLE s3('http://minio:9000/test/output.parquet', 'minio', 'minio123', 'Parquet')
Query id: ad53ca7a-0e83-4250-a607-d2d956223c2c
РћїРћђnameРћђРћгРћђtypeРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћгРћђdefault_typeРћђРћгРћђdefault_expressionРћђРћгРћђcommentРћђРћгРћђcodec_expressionРћђРћгРћђttl_expressionРћђРћљ
1. Рћѓ ts   Рћѓ Nullable(String) Рћѓ              Рћѓ                    Рћѓ         Рћѓ                  Рћѓ                Рћѓ
РћћРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћ┤РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћў
SELECT version()
РћїРћђversion()РћђРћђРћђРћђРћљ
1. Рћѓ 25.10.1.3832 Рћѓ
РћћРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћў
CREATE TABLE test
(
`ts` DateTime64(9, 'UTC')
)
ORDER BY tuple();
```
# S3
## Insert nr.1 - With a single file ClickHouse throws a parsing exception
```sql
INSERT INTO test (ts) SELECT ts
FROM s3('http://minio:9000/test/output.parquet', 'minio', 'minio123')
Query id: c6a148a0-e470-4d0e-9110-5e6f41d5486e
Elapsed: 0.022 sec.
Received exception from server (version 25.10.1):
Code: 6. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000.
DB::Exception: Cannot parse string '2020-01-01 14:00:00+00:00' as DateTime64(9, 'UTC'): syntax error at position 19 (parsed just '2020-01-01 14:00:00'):
while converting column `ts` from type String to type DateTime64(9, 'UTC'): (in file/uri test/output.parquet):
While executing ParquetBlockInputFormat: While executing ReadFromObjectStorage. (CANNOT_PARSE_TEXT)
```
## Insert nr.2 - With brace expression ClickHouse doesn't throw the exception
```sql
INSERT INTO test (ts) SELECT ts
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO test_single_file (ts) SELECT CAST(ts AS TIMESTAMP) FROM <your_s3_function>('http://minio:9000/test/output.parquet', 'minio', 'minio123');

INSERT INTO test_brace_expression (ts) SELECT CAST(ts AS TIMESTAMP) FROM <your_s3_function>('http://minio:9000/test/output.parquet', 'minio', 'minio123') UNION ALL SELECT CAST(ts AS TIMESTAMP) FROM <your_s3_function>('http://minio:9000/test/output.parquet', 'minio', 'minio123');
key_bug_features: Parsing exception with single file vs brace expression
